channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PRATIKSH] Pratiksha Chemicals changes name to Vellora Impact Limited
item.description:
Pratiksha Chemicals Ltd has received approval from the Registrar of Companies (ROC) for its name change to Vellora Impact Limited, effective April 10, 2026. This follows shareholder approval via postal ballot on February 20, 2026, and an initial intimation to the stock exchange on December 26, 2025. A fresh Certificate of Incorporation has been issued by the ROC. The company is now in the process of filing the necessary documents with the Stock Exchange to update its records. The name change does not affect stakeholder rights or liabilities, and the company must display its old name for two years.

  • Pratiksha Chemicals renamed to Vellora Impact Limited.
  • ROC approval for name change received on April 10, 2026.
  • Shareholders approved the name change on February 20, 2026.
  • Company is updating stock exchange records for the change.
  • Old name must be displayed for two years post-change.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRATIKSHA CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Rebranding

item.title: [COVIDH] Covidh Technologies changes name to iSERA Lifesciences
item.description:
Covidh Technologies Ltd has officially changed its name to iSERA Lifesciences Limited, effective April 10, 2026. This change was approved by the Registrar of Companies, Pune, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, following a special resolution passed by shareholders at an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on April 02, 2026. The Board had initially approved the name change on March 10, 2026. Consequently, the company's Memorandum and Articles of Association have been updated to reflect the new name. A fresh Certificate of Incorporation has been issued, and the company requests all stakeholders to update their records accordingly.

  • Company name officially changed from Covidh Technologies to iSERA Lifesciences Limited.
  • Registrar of Companies, Pune, approved the name change effective April 10, 2026.
  • Shareholders had approved the name change via special resolution on April 02, 2026.
  • Memorandum and Articles of Association are now altered to reflect the new name.
  • A fresh Certificate of Incorporation has been issued by the MCA.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COVIDH TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED | Category: Rebranding

item.title: [MOTISONS] Motisons Board to Consider Redemption of 50 Lakh Preference Shares
item.description:
Motisons Jewellers Ltd has revised its Board Meeting date from April 15, 2026, to April 16, 2026. The primary agenda for this rescheduled meeting is to consider and approve the redemption of 50,00,000 unlisted 2.5% Non-Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares. This corporate action is contingent upon obtaining all necessary approvals. The company has requested stakeholders to take note of this update regarding the board meeting and its significant agenda item.

  • Board meeting rescheduled to April 16, 2026.
  • Agenda includes redemption of 50 lakh preference shares.
  • Shares are unlisted 2.5% Non-Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares.
  • Redemption is subject to relevant approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Motisons Jewellers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RSWM] RSWM to receive ₹24.97 Cr income tax refund
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RSWM Ltd has received appeal effect orders from the income tax department, confirming total refunds (including interest) amounting to ₹12.73 crore for Assessment Year 2011-12 and ₹12.24 crore for Assessment Year 2013-14. This follows the Hon'ble ITAT, Jodhpur dismissing appeals filed by the revenue. The total receivable refund for the company is ₹24.97 crore. The company has stated that this development will have no impact on its operations.

  • RSWM Ltd is set to receive a total income tax refund of ₹24.97 crore.
  • The refund includes ₹12.73 crore for AY 2011-12 and ₹12.24 crore for AY 2013-14.
  • The orders were issued after ITAT Jodhpur dismissed revenue's appeals.
  • The company's operations will not be impacted by this development.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RSWM LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [CUBEINVIT] Cube Highways Trust: Zero investor complaints in Q4 FY26
item.description:
Cube Highways Trust has submitted its investor grievance report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 FY 2025-26), in compliance with SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The report, received from KFin Technologies Limited, the InvIT's Registrar & Transfer Agent, indicates a clean record regarding investor complaints. For both the full financial year 2025-26 and the quarter ending March 31, 2026, the trust reported zero investor complaints pending at the beginning, received during, or pending at the end of the period. This includes all complaints, specifically SCORES complaints, demonstrating effective grievance redressal.

  • Zero investor complaints were pending at the start of FY26.
  • No new investor complaints were received during FY26.
  • All investor complaints were resolved, with none pending.
  • The report covers Q4 FY2025-26 and the full FY2025-26.
  • Compliance with SEBI InvIT Regulations was maintained.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cube Highways Trust | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [FUTSOL] Futuristic Solutions receives ₹2.59 Cr for pending claim settlement
item.description:
Futuristic Solutions Ltd announced on April 10, 2026, that it has received ₹2,59,23,908 in its bank account. This amount represents the final settlement for one of the company's pending claims. The receipt of these funds is a positive development, resolving an outstanding financial matter and improving the company's liquidity. This settlement contributes to the company's financial stability by converting a contingent asset into a realized cash inflow.

  • Company received ₹2.59 crore for a pending claim.
  • Settlement enhances the company's liquidity position.
  • Resolves an outstanding financial matter.
  • Positive impact on cash flow.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FUTURISTIC SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SCBL] Jayshree Jain acquires 9.86% stake in Saptak Chem via preferential allotment
item.description:
Jayshree Jain has disclosed the acquisition of 5,00,000 equity shares of Saptak Chem And Business Ltd, representing 9.86% of the total diluted share capital. The acquisition, made at a face value of ₹10 per share, occurred on April 6, 2026, through a preferential allotment. This transaction was reported under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and significantly impacts the company's shareholding structure and total equity capital.

  • Jayshree Jain acquired 5,00,000 equity shares of Saptak Chem.
  • This acquisition represents 9.86% of the company's diluted share capital.
  • The shares were acquired through a preferential allotment.
  • The transaction took place on April 6, 2026.
  • The company's equity capital increased significantly post-allotment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saptak Chem And Business Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [VIRTUALS] Kati Patang Q4 FY26 Share Capital Audit: 54.35 Lakh Warrants Converted
item.description:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd submitted its Reconciliation of Share Capital Audit Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report details the company's share capital structure, confirming 4,13,33,280 fully paid-up shares and 1,02,56,651 partly paid-up shares. A key highlight for the quarter was the conversion of 54,35,000 warrants into fully paid-up equity shares, which have been duly listed on BSE and intimated to NSDL and CDSL. The report indicates that 98.78% of fully paid-up shares and 100% of partly paid-up shares are held in dematerialized form. There were no discrepancies between issued, listed, and total capital, and no dematerialization requests were pending beyond 21 days.

  • Q4 FY26 share capital audit report submitted.
  • 54.35 lakh warrants converted to fully paid-up shares.
  • Fully paid-up capital stands at 4.13 crore shares.
  • Partly paid-up capital is 1.02 crore shares.
  • All demat requests processed within 21 days.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIRTUALSOFT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [VIRINCHI] Virinchi Allots 8.5 Lakh Shares to Promoter Group
item.description:
Virinchi Ltd has allotted 8,50,000 equity shares of ₹10 each at an issue price of ₹28 per share, including a ₹18 premium. These shares were issued to Vivo Bio Tech Limited, a promoter group entity, upon conversion of warrants on a preferential basis. The company received ₹1,78,50,000, representing 75% of the issue price, as application money. This allotment increases Virinchi's issued and subscribed share capital to ₹1,09,64,68,960, divided into 10,96,46,896 equity shares of ₹10 each. The move strengthens the promoter's holding and injects capital.

  • Virinchi allotted 8.5 lakh equity shares to promoter group.
  • Shares issued at ₹28 each on warrant conversion.
  • Company received ₹1.78 crore as application money.
  • Promoter stake in Virinchi likely increased.
  • Issued share capital increased to 10.96 crore shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Virinchi Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [SCBL] Saptak Chem: Ankush Agarwal HUF acquires 16.27% via preferential allotment
item.description:
Ankush Agarwal HUF has disclosed a substantial acquisition in Saptak Chem And Business Ltd, acquiring 5,00,000 warrants through a preferential allotment. These warrants are convertible into one fully paid equity share of ₹10/- each. Post-acquisition, Ankush Agarwal HUF's holding, including PACs, represents 16.27% of the total share/voting capital and 9.86% of the total diluted share/voting capital of Saptak Chem And Business Ltd. The acquisition date or intimation of allotment of these convertible securities is stated as April 06, 2026, which likely refers to the conversion deadline. The equity share capital of the company after this acquisition stands at ₹3,07,32,270.

  • Ankush Agarwal HUF acquired 5,00,000 warrants in Saptak Chem.
  • The acquisition was executed via a preferential allotment.
  • Warrants are convertible into equity shares by April 2026.
  • This represents 16.27% of the company's voting capital.
  • Post-acquisition, total diluted capital is ₹3.07 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saptak Chem And Business Ltd | Category: Shareholding
